learn.core_idea: Read and write accesses share translation path but interact with protection and residency checks.
mechanism_steps: Translate virtual page to frame mapping.
Verify access mode and mapping validity.
Record access outcome in memory trace.
learn.worked_example: Mixed r/w sequence produces deterministic access and fault evidence.
common_mistakes: Ignoring access mode when debugging results.
Treating all failures as not-present faults.
pre_challenge_checklist: I can parse ACCESS r/w steps.
I can verify with trace and counters.
